settings.title: Listing basics
settings.text: Clarify the asset type, included items, asking range, buyer suitability, delivery expectations, and seller contact pathway.

settings.title: Public vs private
settings.text: Separate public listing information from material that should only be shared after buyer qualification.

settings.title: Review and route
settings.text: Create a clear listing pathway that routes qualified buyers to enquiry, review, payment, or follow-up steps.

settings.heading: Prepare a business asset for listing
settings.text: Use this guide to understand what information sellers should prepare before submitting a business, asset, digital property, system, or packaged opportunity.

settings.heading: Seller next steps and process links
settings.text: Use these pages to prepare, submit, and understand the listing process.
